title: Greatly Glazed Brazilian Chicken Skewers
description: Tangy and juicy Brazilian dish featuring white sauerkraut and ferment-jang, perfect for a paleo-friendly dinner
instructions: Preheat the grill to 400 degrees Fahrenheit
In a large bowl, whisk together coconut sugar, lime juice, ferment-jang, garlic, salt, and black pepper
Add the chicken to the bowl and toss to coat with the marinade
Thread the chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally
While the chicken is cooking, heat the olive oil in a small saucepan over medium heat
Add the white sauerkraut to the saucepan and cook, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned
Brush the chicken with the sauerkraut mixture during the last 2 minutes of cooking
Serve the chicken hot, garnished with additional sauerkraut if desired
